chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, KARACHI C.P.No.D-4050/2013 Date Order with signature of Judge PRESENT: Mr. Justice Muhammad Ali Mazhar. Mr. Justice Arshad Hussain Khan. Raza Ali Bhatti vs. Province of Sindh and two others. ------------------- FOR HEARING OF MAIN CASE 14.10.2016. Muhammad Ismail, Director Legal. Mr. Abdul Jabbar Qureshi, AAG. ----------- On the last date of hearing, the petitioner and his counsel were called absent. Today, again, position is the same. Even otherwise, the petitioners have approached this Court for implementation of the Provincial Ombudsman’s order for which application should have been filed before the learned Ombudsman rather than this Constitution Petition. Mr. Muhammad Islam, Director Legal of Respondent No.3 submits that against the order of the learned Ombudsman, the respondent No.3 has already filed appeal to the Governor Sindh, which fact is mentioned in para-2 of their written statement. In the above circumstances, this petition is dismissed. Judge Judge Jamil
